sections.heading: Education
items: Master of Public Policy (MPP), University of Chicago, USA
B.A. in Political Science (Public Administration Division), National Taiwan University

sections.heading: Professional Experience
items: Associate Professor, Graduate Institute of Journalism, National Taiwan University (2025–present)
Deputy General Manager, TVBS News Department (2020–2025)
Producer and Host, Step by Step: Discovering New Taiwan, TVBS (2004–2025)
Staff Reporter, News Anchor, Head of Political Desk, Head of Special Reports Desk, Deputy Director of News Gathering Center, Deputy Managing Editor & Producer, TVBS (1993–2007)
Adjunct Lecturer, Department of Journalism, Shih Hsin University (2005–2006)

sections.heading: Honors and Awards
items: Distinguished Award for Excellence in Communication Management (2015)
Award for Outstanding Contribution to Communication; Golden Wheel Award for Best Program Host, Rotary International Public Service Journalism Awards (2010)
Golden Bell Award for Educational Programming (2009)
Golden Bell Award for Best Program Host (2005)
Golden Bell Award for Investigative Reporting (2000)

teachingField: Current Affairs Forum: Planning and Production
